hero.name: MyeongSub Kim
hero.title: Full-Stack AI Developer
hero.subtitle: I build production-ready web & mobile applications at 3–5× the usual speed using AI-assisted development.

about.label: About
about.heading: Building digital products from Seoul to Tokyo
about.p1: As the founder of MOVA Tech — a B2B AI & Product Studio — I deliver end-to-end solutions from discovery to launch. I specialize in rapid delivery without compromising quality.
about.p2: Fluent in Korean, Japanese, and English, I bridge the gap between Korean and Japanese markets. With experience building and shipping real products, I bring both technical depth and business understanding to every project.

musubee.title: musubee
musubee.subtitle: Japanese Market Mobile App
musubee.description: Full-cycle iOS/Android app built with Flutter + Supabase + Firebase. Co-developed with a Japanese partner company, from planning to App Store launch.

movatech.title: MOVA Tech
movatech.subtitle: Corporate Website
movatech.description: Trilingual (KR/JP/EN) B2B studio website built with Next.js + Tailwind CSS, deployed on Cloudflare.

lohas.title: LOHAS Resorts
lohas.subtitle: Resort Admin Dashboard
lohas.description: Co-developed with a Japanese company. Responsible for backend, logic design, and role-based access control for the admin dashboard.

webapp.title: Web Applications
webapp.description: Full-stack SaaS MVPs, dashboards, and internal tools built with Next.js, React, and Node.js.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps
mobile.description: Cross-platform iOS/Android applications built with Flutter. From prototype to App Store launch.

ai.title: AI Solutions
ai.description: Custom chatbots, AI agents, RAG systems, and automation pipelines using Claude API and GPT.

landing.title: Landing Pages
landing.description: High-converting, responsive landing pages delivered fast. Perfect for startups and product launches.

contact.label: Contact
contact.heading: Let's build something together
contact.description: Have a project in mind? I'd love to hear about it. Reach out and let's discuss how I can help.

footer.tagline: Momentum of Value — Building technology that moves value forward.
